pr.title: REHA-DEQ-WSE: Deep Equilibrium with Weight Synthesis for Parameter-Efficient Language Modeling

output.summary: Uses a single DEQ layer iterated to convergence plus an entropy-driven weight synthesis hypernetwork to adapt to prose vs code within 16MB.
techniques: Deep equilibrium fixed-point iteration instead of stacking layers
Entropy-driven weight synthesis hypernetwork tunes the layer per input type
